figures.caption: Figure 2. Overview of Attention Complexity. Softmax attention explicitly forms the dense attention matrix QK⊤ ∈ RN×N and then multiplies by V , resulting in O(N2d) time complexity. Linear attention leverages associativity to rewrite the computation as Q (K⊤V ), avoiding the N ×N matrix and reducing complexity to O(Nd2). SVD-Attention applies a rank-r SVD (r ≪ d) to obtain a low-rank factorization. After reassembling the decomposed UΣV , the computation of U can theoretically be eliminated, as U⊤U = I , in low rank representations, which maintains the order of computation as in traditional attention, yielding an overall complexity of O(Ndr).

Figure 4. Forward latency of the attention module on CPU under single-thread execution. The x-axis varies the history length N and the y-axis is the time in milliseconds. Candidate size m and embedding dimension d are held fixed.
